(workbench.web.main.js, line 657) [Error] Source Map loading errors (x7) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (addon-clipboard.js.map, line 0) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (xterm.js.map, line 0) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (main.js.map, line 0) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (addon-webgl.js.map, line 0) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (addon-unicode11.js.map, line 0) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (workbench.js.map, line 0) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (layout.contribution.darwin.js.map, line 0) ``` ``` [Error] The terminal process terminated with exit code: 1. c (workbench.web.main.js:812:89947) B (workbench.web.main.js:90:738) C (workbench.web.main.js:90:804) fire (workbench.web.main.js:90:1020) addNotification (workbench.web.main.js:812:84219) notify (workbench.web.main.js:1938:75765) (anonymous function) (workbench.web.main.js:2617:56489) ``` May be we should repackage data we need, so it work as single bundle or multiple bundles accessable directly from https://link-foundation.github.io/rust-web-box folder/domain. We also need to log all debug details that will help us if the issues will persist. And also we should cover as much as possible with e2e browser tests using https://github.com/link-foundation/browser-commander We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration. If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code. Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context autocompacts and you can continue indefinetely, do as much as possible in one go, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done. Please use Playwright MCP to debug everything in your local browser.
title: We need to fix all errors and warnings, so it will be easier to see problems if they occur, we still need continue fixing issues that prevents our rust web box from working in GitHub Pages
